response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems with strong testing/craftsmanship practices, but lacks the core requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to a single 6-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015), far below the 5-10 years required. No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development, SQL Server/Oracle, fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking. The technical stack is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which does not align with the C++/Windows/financial systems profile required.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Diverse polyglot programming experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated communication skills through workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015), far below the 5-10 years required
No demonstrated experience in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains
No evidence of Windows platform development or SQL Server/Oracle expertise
